plan_metadata.name: Teams Agent With Data AI Search Azure OpenAI py Remote Debug

steps.description: Click the "Teams Agents and Apps" option from the dropdown menu in the "New Project" window.
Click the "General Teams Agent" dropdown option in the "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" menu.
Click the "Azure AI Search" option in the "Select an option to load your data" dropdown within the "Teams Agent with Data" window of Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Python" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.
Click on the "Default folder" dropdown in the "Workspace Folder" dialog to select the directory for the project location (`/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects`).
Click the "env" folder in the Explorer panel of Visual Studio Code to select it.
Click the ".env.dev.user" file listed under the "env" folder in the Explorer panel of Visual Studio Code.
Click on the ".env.dev.user" file tab in the Explorer panel of Visual Studio Code to open its contents.
Type into the .env.dev.user file in VS Code at line 8, column 1, without entering any text.
Click the ".env.playground.user" file in the "env" folder within the Explorer panel of Visual Studio Code to select or open the file.
Click inside the ".env.playground.user" file's text editor at line 10 in Visual Studio Code to place the cursor after the "AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT=" variable.
Focus the text cursor at line 10, column 1 in the .env.playground.user file within Visual Studio Code, without entering any text.
Click the text editing area of VSCode's ".env.playground.user" file at line 9, within the "AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT=" value field.
Type #text:"text-embedding-ada-002" at line 9, column 35 in the .env.playground.user file opened in Visual Studio Code.
Press the Down Arrow key to move the cursor from line 9 to line 10 in the .env.playground.user file within Visual Studio Code.
Type ${{secret:AZURE_SEARCH_KEY}} into the AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT field on line 10 of the .env.playground.user file in Visual Studio Code.
Press the Down Arrow key to move the text cursor from line 10 to line 11 in the ".env.playground.user" file within Visual Studio Code.
Type ${{env:AZURE_SEARCH_ENDPOINT}} into the AZURE_SEARCH_KEY field within the .env.playground.user file in Visual Studio Code.
Save changes to the ".env.playground.user" file in Visual Studio Code by pressing Ctrl+S in the active text editor.
Right-click on the tab for ".env.playground.user" at the top of the Visual Studio Code editor to open the context menu for the file tab.
Click the "Close" option in the context menu for the ".env.playground.user" file in the VS Code Explorer panel.

parameters.sample:
=== Generated Script ===
Language: bash

```bash
file="/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/vscuse_app_Xr7g7/env/.env.dev.user"
if [ ! -f "$file\" ]; then
  echo "File not found: $file"
  exit 1
fi
sed -i '/^AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT=/d' "$file"
echo "AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT=text-embedding-ada-002" >> "$file"
sed -i '/^SECRET_AZURE_SEARCH_KEY=/d' "$file"
echo "SECRET_AZURE_SEARCH_KEY=${{secret:AZURE_SEARCH_KEY:}}" >> "$file"
sed -i '/^AZURE_SEARCH_ENDPOINT=/d' "$file"
echo "AZURE_SEARCH_ENDPOINT=https://atktest-ai-search.search.windows.net" >> "$file"
echo "Variables updated in $file"
```

=== Execution Results ===
Exit Code: 0

Variables updated in /home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/vscuse_app_Xr7g7/env/.env.dev.user

✓ Script executed successfully

=== Generated Script ===
Language: bash

```bash
ENV_FILE="/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/vscuse_app_Xr7g7/env/.env.playground.user"

# Verify file exists
if [ ! -f "$ENV_FILE" ]; then
  echo "File not found: $ENV_FILE"
  exit 1
fi

grep -q '^AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT=' "$ENV_FILE" && \
  sed -i 's/^AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT=.*/AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT=text-embedding-ada-002/' "$ENV_FILE" || \
  echo 'AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT=text-embedding-ada-002' >> "$ENV_FILE"

grep -q '^SECRET_AZURE_SEARCH_KEY=' "$ENV_FILE" && \
  sed -i 's/^SECRET_AZURE_SEARCH_KEY=.*/SECRET_AZURE_SEARCH_KEY=${{secret:AZURE_SEARCH_KEY:}}/' "$ENV_FILE" || \
  echo 'SECRET_AZURE_SEARCH_KEY=${{secret:AZURE_SEARCH_KEY:}}' >> "$ENV_FILE"

grep -q '^AZURE_SEARCH_ENDPOINT=' "$ENV_FILE" && \
  sed -i 's|^AZURE_SEARCH_ENDPOINT=.*|AZURE_SEARCH_ENDPOINT=https://atktest-ai-search.search.windows.net|' "$ENV_FILE" || \
  echo 'AZURE_SEARCH_ENDPOINT=https://atktest-ai-search.search.windows.net' >> "$ENV_FILE"

echo "Updated environment file: $ENV_FILE"
cat "$ENV_FILE"
```
